rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop); no Cowork for AE101.
Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body claims are consistent with shipped Claude Code behavior. `/model` swaps Sonnet/Opus and thinking-effort levels (high / xhigh / medium) are documented platform features. Maintainer block claims build pipeline confirmed at scripts/build-workbook.js:161.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Auto-load is filename-based, not folder-based.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Maintainer-block 'auto-discover in every session' refers to skill auto-discovery (lazy-load tier), distinct from CLAUDE.md filename-based auto-load. Correct vocabulary.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions are the unit of work.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Line 36 'Start a new Claude Code session in THAT repo' uses correct session-unit language. Step 0 'Fire up Claude Code' is acceptable for the prework one-time-launch case.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Pseudo-URI + kill-switch for public/private split.
Source URL + type label — mandatory.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No practitioner citations or statistics in student-facing body. Prework is setup-only.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Zombie stat guard.
Artifact-realism — every named tool/skill/path must exist.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Skills access-control-analysis + stride confirmed installed at ~/.claude/skills/. Build scripts confirmed: scripts/build-workbook.js (CONTENT_URL substitution at line 161) and scripts/build-ae101-content-tarball.sh. content/skills/ source dir exists with both shipped skills plus agentic-nerd + security-tools.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: One-at-a-time question discipline lives in fenced prompt 2 ('ask one question at a time if you need to') and fenced prompt 3 ('One candidate at a time.'). Body callout at line 56 mirrors the in-fence forcing function for the skim-reader.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verification machinery needs a smoke-test.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt 2 Step 3 ends 'Confirm each installed skill has a SKILL.md file and tell me the absolute path' — smoke-test on install. Step 5 confirms repo readiness (tests run, git clean, PR-able). Built+tested, not built-only.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers as staged progression.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prework is setup-only. Context-tier teaching belongs in M1+.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: <CONTENT_URL> in fenced prompt 1 is the explicit documented exception per maintainer block: build-time substituted by scripts/build-workbook.js (verified at line 161). Source markdown carries the literal placeholder so substitution is auditable; rendered workbook never shows it. Not student-fill-in.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: One-sentence action lead-in before prompt block.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: All three prompts have lead-ins with command verbs (fetch / extract+install+screen+confirm / use AskUserQuestion).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical lead-in + Prompt label + fenced shape.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Registry-sourced; expander reconstructs **Prompt** *(Claude Code)* canonical shape.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Skills invoke by name, not path.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt 2 names skills by slug. Step 3 says 'Install them wherever personal Claude Code skills belong on this machine' — path-agnostic. The 'content/skills/ folder as the source' reference is the install-source folder, not a skill invocation path; acceptable.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chain prompts by back-reference + deterministic path.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Frontmatter requires/produces chain: ae101-prework-download-tarball produces ae101-content-tarball at ~/Downloads/ae101-content.tar.gz, consumed by ae101-prework-extract-and-install. Deterministic path; correct.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No markdown shout inside fenced prompts.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No bold/italic markdown inside any fence.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Preamble before action — design around it.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Prompt 2 (5 sub-steps): opening line 'Walk these in order, ask one question at a time if you need to, no preamble.'
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Trigger met (>=4 sub-steps). 'no preamble' suppressor present inline at prompt opening. Non-canonical placement (rule 17a names last-line form as canonical), but functionally fires. TODO carried from prior audit; non-blocking.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Prompt-body edits require maintainer approval.
Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths (Agents 101-specific).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: AE101 uses student's existing repo; rule scope is Agents 101.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't restate session CWD inside prompt body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompts reference ~/Downloads and ~/Documents because these are deliberately outside the repo CWD — they name what the prompt acts on. No bare absolute paths restating session root.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Prompts live in registry; module files reference by marker.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: All three prompts at curriculum/prompts/ae101-prework-*.md with proper frontmatter; module uses {{prompt:<key>}} markers (lines 50, 60, 64).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No module-name references in prompt prose.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: ae101-prework-extract-and-install names 'Module 1' as the next-target the agent must confirm readiness for. Load-bearing forward-pointer in prework, not a cross-cohort curriculum-internal reference. Non-blocking.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body lead-in mirrors prompt's opening phrasing.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt 1 body lead-in 'fetch the content tarball to ~/Downloads/' rhymes with prompt 'Download the AE101 content tarball to ~/Downloads/...'. Prompt 3 body lead-in mirrors AskUserQuestion + one-at-a-time. Prompt 2 lead-in summarizes the numbered moves.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Declare permission-mode when paste requires a specific mode.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prework prompts run in default mode. No plan/acceptEdits/auto/bypassPermissions dependency.

platform_claims_checked.claim: CLI or desktop, your call. Open a new session with the repo as the working directory.
Claude will need to write outside the repo (~/Documents/ae101-content/ and ~/.claude/skills/); approve the permission prompts.
Skills install to ~/.claude/skills/ (user-level), auto-discover in every session regardless of cwd.
Windows: Git Bash ships native curl.exe and tar.exe (Win10 1803+).

urls_sampled.note: Build-time placeholder; substituted per-customer by scripts/build-workbook.js at line 161. No live URL to sample in source; rendered workbook carries the customer-specific URL.

todos.note: Preamble suppressor 'no preamble' sits at prompt opening, not as the canonical last-line form per rule 17a. Functionally fires; canonical shape is 'No preamble. <first action>' as the last line. Carried from prior audit; non-blocking.
